behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, tool names (browser_start_video, browser_stop_video), command names (video-start, video-stop), capability name (devtools), and the --filename option are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to create/change at a high level (add tools, rename capability, add commands) without giving exact code or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for tool names, capability strings, command declarations via regex, and presence of key identifiers — multiple valid implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run npm install, eslint, lint-packages, generate_channels.js subprocesses and node syntax checks, plus content checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2p tests require actual files/modules/tool declarations with correct capability strings and command mappings — a stub wouldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover video.ts creation, tracing->devtools rename, CLI commands, --caps help, backward compat, and browser tools import.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and named with clear intent.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names appear consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify as part of the task scope, which is appropriate for a multi-file refactor task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd config edit.
